independence: Reviewers ran read-only; Program Director consolidated without reducing severity.

findings.evidence: deploy.yml triggers on push:main and deploys both Railway services; ci.yml not run on main.
findings.required_action: Target PR at develop; log blocker; do not merge to main while deploy.yml armed.
findings.resolution: PR base set to develop (deploy.yml fires only on main). BLK-003 logged. deploy.yml left unmodified (not owned; P1 reconciles).

findings.evidence: deploy.yml armed on main, no GitHub environment protection; local guard cannot stop a merge.
findings.required_action: Disarm or route around; record residual risk + compensating control.
findings.resolution: Same as DRM-1; residual risk recorded in BLK-003 and GATE_G-P0 record; explicit STOP condition added to WP.

findings.requirement: DoD: evidence manifest hashes every artifact (DOCS/06 §2)
findings.evidence: capture-evidence.sh writes only SHA256SUMS; no manifest.json; stop-evidence-check.sh blocks completion without it.
findings.resolution: Added scripts/make-evidence-manifest.py; P0 run emits manifest.json + environment.json.

findings.requirement: Acceptance: durable evidence for every claim
findings.evidence: Bootstrap SHA256SUMS hashed only 4 files; WP doc/ADR/traceability/council/gate not in any manifest.
findings.required_action: Produce complete WP-P0-001 evidence pack with manifest hashing all artifacts.
findings.resolution: Full WP-P0-001/<run-id> pack generated: gate logs + council files + manifest hashing all artifacts.

findings.evidence: ci.yml has no push:main trigger; main deploy runs with no CI.
findings.required_action: Add main to CI or gate deploy.yml; document branch protection.
findings.resolution: Logged in BLK-003 with compensating control (PR->develop, human-merge-only main). deploy/CI reconciliation owned by WP-P1-001.

findings.evidence: quality-gate.sh fast does not regenerate+diff registry nor run guard self-test.
findings.required_action: Run those checks in evidence and cite CI docs-and-guards as authoritative.
findings.resolution: registry-diff and guard self-test run+captured in this evidence pack; CI docs-and-guards cited as authoritative enforcement.

findings.evidence: Windows host; CRLF could break ubuntu `git diff --exit-code DOCS/PROJECT_SKILLS.md`.
findings.resolution: Added .gitattributes enforcing LF for DOCS/PROJECT_SKILLS.md, *.sh, *.py, generated docs.
environment.json emitted in this evidence pack.
Accepted as safe-failing for P0; logged to backlog. Guard intentionally conservative.

findings.evidence: Guard is local-shell only; does not cover CI merges, force-push to develop, or Railway API token use.
findings.required_action: Document guard scope boundary; consider denying curl to backboard.railway.com.
findings.resolution: Guard scope boundary documented in GATE_G-P0 record; merge-time controls are branch-protection/CI responsibilities (BLK-003).
Logged to backlog; local evidence pack provides durable record for P0.

conditions_resolved: All STOP=none; CRITICAL/MAJOR remediated or routed/deferred with compensating controls before implementation.
decision: Proceed to implementation under the remediated plan (PR base=develop; full evidence manifest; .gitattributes LF; BLK-003 logged).
